zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy於1436年10月12日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，他的父親Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy31歲，母親Lady Catherine Maxwell26歲。他於1460年3月25日與Elizabeth Montgomery在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年12月29日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy was born on 12 October 1436, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, was 31 and his mother, Lady Catherine Maxwell, was 26. He married Elizabeth Montgomery on 25 March 1460, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 December 1508, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy est né le 12 octobre 1436, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Maxwell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Montgomery le 25 mars 1460, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1508, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedyが1436年10月12日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedyは31歳，母Lady Catherine Maxwellは26歳であった。1460年3月25日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでElizabeth Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年12月29日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで72歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy(이)가 1436년 10월 12일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Maxwell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1460년 3월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Elizabeth Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 12월 29일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1436, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Maxwell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Montgomery em 25 de março de 1460, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy родился 12 октября 1436 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Maxwell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Montgomery 25 марта 1460 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 декабря 1508 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия.
